detail.description:
The Mobile Suit Gundam series: 40 years of history culminates in an ultimate collision!

Games like *Mobile Suit Gundam*, *New Mobile Report Gundam Wing*, *Mobile Suit Gundam SEED*, *Mobile Suit Gundam 00*, and *Mobile Suit Gundam UC* offer a glimpse into the vibrant world of Gundam!

■■■■■ Game Features ■■■■■

● Real-time Intense Battles at Different Levels ● No more ordinary battles! Experience three-dimensional real-time combat in the vast universe.

Beam sabers, beam rifles, and all-area att
detail.recentChanges:
▶5.3版本新增內容：

*機體/駕駛員
5.3版本更新後遊戲內新登場的新機體，在首次啟用機體時將會直接獲得專屬駕駛員*1。
5.3版本更新後，所有機體將只可搭乘其專屬駕駛員。

*競技場
組隊競技場開啟【輕匹配】測試。

*神秘商店
新增部分機體的駕駛員的額外立繪式樣和EX特寫，可在神秘商店中進行購買。

*格納庫
主畫面的的駕駛員功能合併至格納庫中。

*登入畫面
進入遊戲時將隨機播放駕駛員語音。

eventMentions.text: 112/9/26更新後完全登入不了，一直卡在主畫面... 問題真的太多！！ 比如說很多按鍵按下去當下應該要反應的結果卻都沒有動作！ 完全無法像是在ps3 ps4上的模式來操作！ 越來越難用！課金一推也
i played this game since this game server began. it was good game but very poor experience from this
please change how people log in to their accounts. it's so annoying to not be able to login with goo
overly sensitive to the connection. makes game play atrocious - especially when on the move. sometim
after update the game cannot log in at all
